name: Draw Wire
author: Poki
description: Get ready for some electrifying gameplay in Draw Wire, a puzzle game that tests your intellect and precision. Connect different electrical appliances to their power source accross more than 50 different levels, each posing a new and more difficult challenge. Can you solve all the shocking scenarios? How do I play Draw Wire? Click and drag with the mouse to connect the objects! Who created Draw Wire? Draw Wire is created by OSA Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Color Pencil Run , Marble Run 3D , Smash It and Zombroad ! How can I play Draw Wire for free? You can play Draw Wire for free on Poki. Can I play Draw Wire on mobile devices and desktop? Draw Wire can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
